form.formComment: Last start 9th (Fr2) over 1710m after showing early speed at Goulburn, well beaten by Second To Nun (2:06.60) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $31. Two runs back 6th (Fr1) over 1740m after showing early pace at Bankstown was leading by 5.6 at the bell, beaten 60 m by Second To Nun (2:14.10) in NR up to 56 on March 16 at $13. Hard to have.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into second behind Kennywould at this track over 2300m in a NR up to 53 on March 24 at $10. Then a handy effort when a close second behind Second To Nun at Goulburn over 1710m in a NR up to 55 on March 30 at $6. Plenty to like about her prospects.

One of the better hopes.

Capable of more than she has shown recently. Respect.
